sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111512" key="filosune/stios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλοσυν-έστιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111512.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving those who share one's home,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
